templates.Title: Composite: order form
templates.Summary: Ready-to-paste replace_form_schema for a canonical order form

rules.Title: Customised form: ask user before mutating
rules.Condition: Any mutating op (add_field, remove_field, set_field_property, set_form_meta, replace_form_schema, etc.) on a form whose settings has non-empty customHtml/customCss/customScripts/theme/themeCssOverrides, BEFORE the user has recorded a designDecision via chat reply or op flag.
rules.RejectionMessage: This form has a custom design. The user has NOT yet decided whether the design can be changed. Default is preserve.
rules.FixHint: Workflow: (1) emit ONE chat_message asking the user "keep design (A, default) or allow design changes (B)?". (2) Stop and wait for user reply. (3) Re-emit ops with designDecision:"preserve" or "change" on each. Session-level decision so subsequent ops skip the gate automatically.

rules.Title: Use rich choices by default for short option sets
rules.Condition: AI emits plain Radio for plan/tier/package/pass with <=6 short options OR plain Checkbox for interests/tags/skills/features/preferences with short labels
rules.RejectionMessage: Plain Radio/Checkbox makes new AI forms look default/basic even though the renderer supports premium cards/chips on mock-catalog rails.
rules.FixHint: Use type:"Cards" for single-choice plan/tier/package/pass pickers, or Radio + optionDisplay:"cards". Use type:"Chips" for multi-choice interests/tags/skills/features/preferences, or Checkbox + optionDisplay:"chips". Plain Radio/Checkbox only for >8 options or long sentence labels. Emit text/description/meta/badge only; MegaForm assigns mock-catalog icons and global CSS.

rules.Title: Convert form must preserve design (no blanking customCss/customHtml/theme)
rules.Condition: set_form_meta with customCss:"" / customHtml:"" / theme:"" OR replace_form_schema while existing form has customisations and new settings has any of them as empty string
rules.RejectionMessage: Blanking design fields wipes paid-for visual work. User asked to convert purpose, not destroy design.
rules.FixHint: Drop customCss/customHtml/theme from set_form_meta entirely OR use customCssAppend / customHtmlAppend to ADD on top. For replace_form_schema, pass preserveCustomizations:true and omit customCss/customHtml/theme from new settings â€” they auto-merge from existing.

rules.Title: items[] empty
rules.Condition: items array missing or empty
rules.RejectionMessage: No items supplied â€” default Apple-product items will render.
rules.FixHint: Provide items:[{imageUrl,title,description,badge?,meta?},â€¦].

rules.Title: Empty item filtered
rules.Condition: item has no imageUrl AND no title/description/meta/badge
rules.RejectionMessage: Fully empty item silently dropped.
rules.FixHint: Each item needs at least one visible field.

rules.Title: imageFit cover|contain
rules.Condition: imageFit not in {cover,contain}
rules.RejectionMessage: imageFit auto-normalised to "cover".
rules.FixHint: Use "cover" or "contain".

rules.Title: items[] uses imageUrl, not image
rules.Condition: item shape uses "image" instead of "imageUrl"
rules.RejectionMessage: Canonical item key is imageUrl. Aliases "image" and "src" are accepted but deprecated.
rules.FixHint: Emit items:[{imageUrl, title, description, badge?, meta?, alt?}]. The Builder property editor only writes imageUrl.

rules.Title: ContentSlider is for slideshows, not single header images
rules.Condition: AI emits ContentSlider with exactly 1 item for a "header" / "banner" / "hero" use case
rules.RejectionMessage: Single-image header is the Html field's job. ContentSlider is for â‰¥2 slides with autoplay.
rules.FixHint: Use the form_pattern-header-image pattern: emit Html with at insertAt:0. Only use ContentSlider when the user explicitly wants a carousel of multiple images.

rules.Title: Reject bare DataGrid
rules.Condition: no masterQuery AND no custom columns
rules.RejectionMessage: no widgetProps.masterQuery AND no widgetProps.columns â€” would render the default invoice template ITEM/QTY/PRICE/TOTAL.
rules.FixHint: Pick ONE: (1) DISPLAY mode â†’ widgetProps.{useSql:true, dataSource:"sql", connectionKey:"DashboardDatabase", masterQuery, queryDependsOn:"parent_key"}; or (2) INPUT mode â†’ widgetProps.columns=[{key,label,type,required?,decimals?,computeFormula?}â€¦].

rules.Title: SQL mode requires masterQuery
rules.Condition: useSql=true AND masterQuery empty
rules.RejectionMessage: SQL display mode requires widgetProps.masterQuery.
rules.FixHint: Set masterQuery. Auto-derived columns means you can omit columns and the widget will read from the SQL result.

rules.Title: totalField must point to an existing field
rules.Condition: totalField set but field key not present in form
rules.RejectionMessage: totalField references a field key that does not exist.
rules.FixHint: Either remove totalField or add a Number/Hidden field with that key first.

rules.Title: computeFormula references undeclared column
rules.Condition: computeFormula identifier not in columns[]
rules.RejectionMessage: Undeclared identifier in computeFormula silently resolves to 0.
rules.FixHint: Use only declared column keys.

rules.Title: Sum/Avg/Min/Max require quoted expression
rules.Condition: Sum/Avg/Min/Max called with bare identifier
rules.RejectionMessage: Aggregate function needs a quoted-string argument to iterate rows.
rules.FixHint: Wrap inner expression in quotes: Sum("qty * price"), Avg("score")

rules.Title: No placeholder htmlContent without SQL
rules.Condition: masterQuery empty AND htmlContent matches placeholder regex
rules.RejectionMessage: no SQL (widgetProps.masterQuery) AND no real htmlContent â€” would render placeholder text.
rules.FixHint: Either: (1) wire SQL â†’ widgetProps.{useSql:true, dataSource:"sql", resultMode:"multi", connectionKey:"DashboardDatabase", masterQuery, wrapperTemplate, rowTemplate}; or (2) supply htmlContent with real {{field:KEY}}/{{submission:KEY}} tokens; or (3) SQL simple â†’ masterQuery + resultMode:"simple" + htmlContent with {{row:Col}}.

rules.Title: Cascade parent must exist and not be display-only
rules.Condition: queryDependsOn references missing key OR a display-only widget
rules.RejectionMessage: queryDependsOn parent does not exist or is a display-only widget.
rules.FixHint: Add a Select/Text/Number/Date/Radio/Checkbox/Hidden field for the parent FIRST. DataRepeater, DataGrid, GridRepeater, DynamicLabel, Html are display-only and cannot be cascade parents.

rules.Title: wrapperTemplate in multi mode must contain {{rows}}
rules.Condition: resultMode=multi AND wrapperTemplate does not contain {{rows}}
rules.RejectionMessage: wrapperTemplate is missing the {{rows}} injection point.
rules.FixHint:
Inject {{rows}} where row blocks should repeat. Example:
{{rows}}

rules.Title: useSql + resultMode required in SQL mode
rules.Condition: masterQuery set BUT (useSql=false OR resultMode missing)
rules.RejectionMessage: SQLmode requires useSql:true and resultMode:simple|multi.
rules.FixHint: The ops.normalizeDynamicLabelProps normaliser fills these when masterQuery is present, but emit them explicitly for clarity.

rules.Title: |format=raw on URL attributes
rules.Condition: row template uses {{row:X}} inside src= href= background-image without |format=raw
rules.RejectionMessage: URL tokens emit a rich-display wrapper that breaks parsing.
rules.FixHint: Always:

rules.Title: masterQuery required
rules.Condition: masterQuery empty
rules.RejectionMessage: DataRepeater requires widgetProps.masterQuery â€” otherwise the widget renders a forever-loading spinner.
rules.FixHint: Set masterQuery. If you only need to display fields against a parent, prefer DynamicLabel.

rules.Title: Chart mode needs label+value columns
rules.Condition: chartType in {bar,line,pie} AND (chartLabelCol empty OR chartValueCol empty)
rules.RejectionMessage: chartType is set but chartLabelCol or chartValueCol is missing.
rules.FixHint: Provide both chartLabelCol and chartValueCol, or clear chartType.

rules.Title: Drill query needs :parentId
rules.Condition: detail{N}Query without :parentId binding
rules.RejectionMessage: Drill-down query does not contain :parentId.
rules.FixHint: The trigger column value is bound to :parentId. Example: SELECT * FROM Detail WHERE ParentId = :parentId

rules.Title: detail{N}TriggerCol set without detail{N}Query
rules.Condition: detail{N}TriggerCol non-empty BUT detail{N}Query empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Drill-down trigger has no query to fire.
rules.FixHint: Either remove the trigger column or add the query with :parentId binding.

rules.Title: Field key/label suggests a specific semantic - do not default to Text
rules.Condition: field.key OR field.label matches a known semantic keyword (email/phone/date/url/age/price/budget/message/comments/country/plan/tier/interests/tags/gender/agree/upload/signature/rating) but field.type=Text
rules.RejectionMessage: Text input loses validation and UX of the dedicated type.
rules.FixHint: Map to the canonical type from form_pattern-layout-grammar field_type_by_keyword. Examples: email -> Email; phone -> CompositePhone; date of birth -> Date; plan|tier|package -> Cards; interests|features|tags|skills -> Chips; agree to terms -> Checkbox single.

rules.Title: Custom mode needs template
rules.Condition: displayMode=custom AND no configJson.template/cardTemplate
rules.RejectionMessage: Falls back to default scorecard.
rules.FixHint: Provide configJson.template OR legacy cardTemplate.

rules.Title: dataSource.type sproc|sql
rules.Condition: configJson.dataSource.type not in {sproc,sql}
rules.RejectionMessage: Service only knows these two source types.
rules.FixHint: Use {type:"sproc",name:"â€¦",params:{â€¦}} or {type:"sql",query:"â€¦"}.

rules.Title: Cannot be value-carrying input
rules.Condition: AI binds GolfScorecard to a form value
rules.RejectionMessage: Display-only widget.
rules.FixHint: Use a different widget for input.

rules.Title: masterQuery or columns required
rules.Condition: mode=sql AND masterQuery empty
rules.RejectionMessage: SQL prefill mode needs widgetProps.masterQuery.
rules.FixHint: Set masterQuery and define columns alias-map.

rules.Title: Manual mode needs columns
rules.Condition: mode=manual AND columns empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Manual mode requires columns[].
rules.FixHint: Define columns:[{key,label,type,required?},â€¦].

rules.Title: GridRepeater retired â€” use DataGrid
rules.Condition: AI emits add_field type:"GridRepeater" for a new form
rules.RejectionMessage: GridRepeater is deprecated. Existing forms still render but new forms MUST use DataGrid instead.
rules.FixHint: For invoice/line-items entry: DataGrid input mode with widgetProps.columns. For SQL display: DataGrid with widgetProps.useSql=true.

rules.Title: Html field needs htmlContent
rules.Condition: type=Html AND htmlContent empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Html field with empty htmlContent renders nothing.
rules.FixHint: Set htmlContent to your markup. For tokens that bind to form fields â†’ use DynamicLabel instead.

rules.Title: Img src must come from allowlisted host
rules.Condition: htmlContent contains where host is not allowlisted
rules.RejectionMessage: Html field contains from a host the AI cannot use safely. images.unsplash.com is NOT allowed (you cannot guess a valid photo-<32hex> id). source.unsplash.com is deprecated. AI hallucination of image URLs is the #1 source of broken-icon renders in production.
rules.FixHint: Use ONE of these: (1) Call get_safe_image_url(keywords, width?, height?, style?: "photo"|"placeholder") — returns a guaranteed-working URL on picsum.photos (seed-based, deterministic) or placehold.co. PASTE THAT URL into your . (2) Emit set_field_image_unsplash op with target:"htmlContent" — writes the entire tag for you using picsum.photos. (3) Allowed hosts: ONLY picsum.photos/seed//W/H, placehold.co/WxH//?text=Label, data: URI, relative path.

rules.Title: Renderer auto-injects onerror fallback
rules.Condition: in htmlContent without onerror
rules.RejectionMessage: (informational) Runtime adds onerror automatically.
rules.FixHint: You do not need to write onerror â€” runtime adds it.

rules.Title: Row column spans should sum to 12
rules.Condition: columns[].span sum != 12
rules.RejectionMessage: Row column spans do not sum to 12 â€” visual misalignment.
rules.FixHint: Use one of the palette presets [12], [6,6], [4,4,4], [8,4], [4,8], [3,3,3,3], [3,9], [9,3]. Or any integer spans that total 12.

rules.Title: Row max 4 columns
rules.Condition: columns.length > 4 OR columns.length < 1
rules.RejectionMessage: Row supports 1 to 4 columns.
rules.FixHint: Pick a column count between 1 and 4. For >4 fields side-by-side, use multiple rows.

rules.Title: No Row nesting
rules.Condition: A Row field appears inside another Row's columns[].fields[]
rules.RejectionMessage: Row cannot be nested inside another Row â€” canvas explicitly blocks it.
rules.FixHint: Flatten: emit the inner Row as a separate top-level field, OR use a Section as a heading between two top-level Rows.

rules.Title: Side-by-side related fields should use Row[6,6]
rules.Condition: AI adds 2+ short related fields (first_name + last_name, email + phone, from_date + to_date, city + zip) as separate top-level fields without wrapping in a Row
rules.RejectionMessage: Short related fields stacked vertically read awkwardly. Use Row + columns:[{span:6,fields:[...]},{span:6,fields:[...]}].
rules.FixHint: Emit add_field type:"Row" key:"row_<purpose>" columns:[{span:6,fields:[FIELD_A]},{span:6,fields:[FIELD_B]}] instead of two separate add_field. See form_pattern-layout-grammar composite_patterns.contact_form.

rules.Title: Plain Radio/Checkbox fallback with many options needs optionColumns
rules.Condition: Plain Radio or Checkbox field with >=4 options has no optionColumns set explicitly
rules.RejectionMessage: Stacking 4+ plain options vertically wastes space and reads as a long ladder.
rules.FixHint: First prefer Cards for single-choice <=6 short options and Chips for multi-choice short labels. If plain Radio/Checkbox is still the right fallback, emit set_field_property path:"optionColumns" value:2 (4-6 options) or 3 (7-12 options) or 4 (13+ options). For 13+ single-choice options consider Select dropdown instead.

rules.Title: Stripe needs publishable key
rules.Condition: provider includes stripe AND stripePublishableKey empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Cannot initialise Stripe element.
rules.FixHint: Provide stripePublishableKey or restrict provider to "paypal".

rules.Title: Stripe needs create-intent endpoint
rules.Condition: provider includes stripe AND stripeCreateIntentUrl empty
rules.RejectionMessage: No URL to call for PaymentIntent.
rules.FixHint: Provide stripeCreateIntentUrl (default /api/megaform/payments/stripe/create-intent).

rules.Title: amountMode=fixed needs positive amount
rules.Condition: amountMode=fixed AND amount<=0
rules.RejectionMessage: Positive amount required for fixed-mode payment.
rules.FixHint: Provide amount>0 or switch to amountMode=field/listenTotals.

rules.Title: amountMode=field needs field key
rules.Condition: amountMode=field AND amountFieldKey empty
rules.RejectionMessage: No source field for amount.
rules.FixHint: Pick a non-Payment numeric field for amountFieldKey.

rules.Title: Both pdfUrl and pdfBase64 empty
rules.Condition: no PDF source
rules.RejectionMessage: Widget renders emptyMessage.
rules.FixHint: Upload a PDF via designer or supply pdfUrl.

rules.Title: fields[] entry needs id + kind
rules.Condition: field entry missing id or kind
rules.RejectionMessage: Runtime keys values by field.id â€” missing id loses input.
rules.FixHint: Each field must have id (unique) and kind (signature|image|checkbox|text|number|date).

rules.Title: Mode must be international|national
rules.Condition: mode not in {international,national}
rules.RejectionMessage: Mode auto-defaults to "international".
rules.FixHint: Use one of the two known modes.

rules.Title: defaultCountry must be valid ISO2
rules.Condition: defaultCountry not in countries table
rules.RejectionMessage: defaultCountry coerced to "VN".
rules.FixHint: Use ISO2 codes (e.g. VN, US, GB).

rules.Title: saveFormat must be json|e164
rules.Condition: saveFormat not in {json,e164}
rules.RejectionMessage: saveFormat coerced to "json".
rules.FixHint: Pick "json" (structured) or "e164" (plain string).

rules.Title: Premium custom-shell forms: use scoped CSS variable overrides, not generic .mf-form rules
rules.Condition: set_form_meta customCss/customCssAppend with selectors starting with .mf-form, .mf-form-wrapper, .mf-form-inner ON A FORM where theme=custom and customHtml is non-empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Generic .mf-form rules are outranked by the premium scoped CSS (e.g. .mfp.mfp-X). Your override will not visibly apply.
rules.FixHint: Call inspect_form_customizations to get scopedRootSelector + cssVariables + widthRules. (1) For color/font/spacing: append a scoped re-declaration like "<scopedRootSelector> { --pc-primary: #YOUR_COLOR; }". (2) For width: append a scoped override with !important like "<scopedRootSelector> .mfp-container { max-width: 100% !important; }".

rules.Title: add_field needs {{field:key}} placeholder when customHtml is set
rules.Condition: add_field on customised form without placeholder in customHtml
rules.RejectionMessage: Field will be invisible at runtime.
rules.FixHint: Update customHtml first, or pass forceAddDespiteCustomHtml:true after user confirms.

rules.Title: replace_form_schema must preserve existing customisations
rules.Condition: replace_form_schema on customised form without preserve flag
rules.RejectionMessage: Customisations would be wiped.
rules.FixHint: Set preserveCustomizations:true to auto-merge OR ASK the user first.

rules.Title: Html field cannot define new global CSS class names
rules.Condition: <style> with global classes in Html field
rules.RejectionMessage: Fights premium theme.
rules.FixHint: Use settings.customCss or inline style="â€¦", or reuse theme classes.

rules.Title: Cannot be value-carrying input
rules.Condition: AI tries to bind QRCode to a form value
rules.RejectionMessage: QRCode is display-only â€” never participates in submission.
rules.FixHint: Use Text/Hidden for value-carrying input.

rules.Title: errorLevel L|M|Q|H
rules.Condition: errorLevel not in {L,M,Q,H}
rules.RejectionMessage: errorLevel coerced to "M".
rules.FixHint: Use one of the four standard QR error correction levels.

rules.Title: Options source required
rules.Condition: options[] empty AND field.properties.optionsSql empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Select must have either static options:[{value,label},â€¦] or properties.optionsSql.
rules.FixHint: For SQL options use field.properties (NOT widgetProps): {optionsSource:"sql", optionsConnectionKey:"DashboardDatabase", optionsSql:"SELECT Id AS value, Name AS label FROM â€¦"}.

rules.Title: optionsSql lives under field.properties
rules.Condition: optionsSql emitted under widgetProps.* OR widgetProps.dataSource.*
rules.RejectionMessage: Runtime FieldOptionsService reads field.properties.optionsSql â€” widgetProps shape is IGNORED.
rules.FixHint: Move optionsSql + optionsConnectionKey + optionsDependsOn under field.properties.*. The ops.normalizeOptionFields normaliser hoists for you, but emit canonical shape directly.

rules.Title: SQL must alias value+label
rules.Condition: optionsSql does not contain " AS value" or " AS label"
rules.RejectionMessage: optionsSql columns must be aliased as value + label.
rules.FixHint: SELECT PlayerId AS value, PlayerName AS label FROM GG_Players

rules.Title: Value must be PNG data URL
rules.Condition: attempt to set value to plain text
rules.RejectionMessage: Signature value must be data:image/png;base64,â€¦
rules.FixHint: Use the Type tab to convert text â†’ PNG, then store the data URL.

rules.Title: Required signature missing
rules.Condition: required AND hidden.value empty
rules.RejectionMessage: Signature required.
rules.FixHint: validate() already surfaces this â€” no AI action needed.

rules.Title: widgetProps.style on Row is a no-op
rules.Condition: set_field_property with widgetProps.* on Row
rules.RejectionMessage: Row does not read widgetProps. No-op.
rules.FixHint: Use settings.customCss + field.cssClass for row styling.

rules.Title: Multi-column Radio/Checkbox uses field.optionColumns
rules.Condition: custom CSS for Radio/Checkbox multi-column
rules.RejectionMessage: Use field.optionColumns: 1|2|3|4 instead.
rules.FixHint: set_field_property path:optionColumns value:2|3|4.

rules.Title: Global styling uses settings.customCss
rules.Condition: per-field CSS for global form change
rules.RejectionMessage: Use settings.customCss in one set_form_meta op.
rules.FixHint: set_form_meta customCss:"â€¦" once instead of per-field widgetProps.style.

rules.Title: set_form_meta theme allowlist
rules.Condition: op.op=="set_form_meta" AND op.theme IS NOT IN {default,minimal,modern-blue,warm-sunset,dark-elegance,nature-green,flat-material,classic-formal,playful,healthcare,executive,tech-startup,custom,""}
rules.RejectionMessage: [THEME-001] set_form_meta refused unknown theme. Valid themes: default, minimal, modern-blue, warm-sunset, dark-elegance, nature-green, flat-material, classic-formal, playful, healthcare, executive, tech-startup, custom. The 12 themed CSS classes (.mf-theme-<name>) ship in megaform-themes.css; setting an unknown name leaves the form unscoped and the host site theme (DNN/Oqtane/Bootstrap) bleeds through, collapsing inputs.
rules.FixHint: Pick one of the 12 themes or set theme:"custom" with full customHtml+customCss
